content.en:
"Get out!"

Ye Tian cast the Heaven Slaying Blade across a long distance and slashed directly towards the Ten Thousand Eyes Snake.

But the countless dense eyes on the 10,000-eyed snake moved one after another, forming layers of shields.

The dense shield was stunned to block his Skykiller Blade!

At the same time, many of the eyes on the Pantheon Snake's body released a crimson light, forming a giant crimson eye in the void.

This crimson giant eye locked onto Ye Tian and launched a crimson light attack.

This is definitely a very powerful immeasurable magic technique!

"Ten Arms Golden Body!"

Ye Tian cast this immeasurable magic technique and shook this attack.

Burst!!!!

The crimson light pierced one of the ten golden arms, but it stopped there.

"It actually hurt my ten-armed golden body, this 10,000-eyed snake is not weak!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

Immediately, he performed the Extreme Technique.

At present, I am afraid that only the extreme technique can hurt this thousand-eyed snake.

Airplanes!!!

The Extreme Light slashed towards the Thousand-Eyed Snake, and no matter how many layers of the opponent's shield had, it was pierced by a single blow.

Poof!!

The light of the pole pierced through the body of the 10,000-eyed snake, and even shattered dozens of its eyes, forming a huge hole.

After being attacked, the Cyclops fled immediately, without the slightest intention of fighting.

"If this guy is so cowardly, he ran away when he got hurt?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, it's okay, he seems to have injured the other party with a pole technique, but in fact it is not a heavy injury, and it is not so easy to kill the other party!

In the following days, Ye Tian was here to slowly look for resources.

However, to find a resource and successfully capture it, you also need opportunity and strength.

Sometimes, some resources are guarded by powerful creatures, and when the other party sees that they can't beat them, they will directly flee with the resources or destroy the resources, and will not stay here again.

Therefore, over the long years, Ye Tian did not obtain many resources, but every resource was precious.

this day.

Ye Tian met a Heavenly Ancestor in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and when the other party saw Ye Tian, he didn't say hello, and avoided it directly.

After all, they don't know each other, so there's no need to say hello.

Soon after, he ran into a Heavenly Ancestor again, but instead of avoiding him, this Heavenly Ancestor came directly towards him.

"Your Excellency is a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, I haven't been out for a long time, it seems that there is another Boundary-Breaking Ancestor in our Wanlong Territorial Sea!"

The Heavenly Ancestor smiled.

"I've seen the Star Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian greeted politely.

Although he hadn't seen the Star Heavenly Ancestor, he knew it by snooping at the copy talent.

However, he didn't know why Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor greeted him, as if something was looking for him.

Ye Tian chatted with Xingchen Ancestor for a while, and at this time, Xingchen Ancestor said his purpose: "Endless Ancestor, I want to invite you to hunt a true dragon!"

"Hunt the True Dragon !!" Ye Tian was shocked, "You are not afraid of being surrounded and killed by the True Dragon Clan of the True Dragon Realm Ruins?"

"It's because I'm afraid that I invited you to hunt the True Dragon together! I've already invited a few others, and I'm going to invite a few more Heavenly Ancestors or Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Dao Ancestors like the Endless Great Ancestor, so that I can go hunt that True Dragon when the time comes. As long as it's fast enough, it's not a big problem. Although the True Dragon Clan is powerful, as long as they can't find us, they won't continue to chase and kill!" said Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor.

"Star Heavenly Ancestor, what are you hunting true dragons for?"

Ye Tian was curious.

Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor explained: "There are two purposes, one is that the true dragon occupies a treasure land, and there are a lot of resources in it. The second purpose is to use the blood of the true dragon to water the true dragon blood golden stone, trying to give birth to the true dragon blood chalcedony stone!"

"True Dragon Blood Golden Stone, True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone!"

Ye Tian understood.

There are two kinds of treasures recorded in the treasure illustrated book given to him by the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, among which the value of the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone is very high.

First of all, the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone could channel the Infinite Divine Power Technique inside the Infinite Bone and integrate it into the whole body, that is, it could help the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor of the Boundary Breaking Level to break through to the Heavenly Ancestor realm.

You must know that a resource like Qinglong Liquid can only help the Invincible Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor to attack the Heavenly Ancestor, and it is useless for the Boundary-Breaking Level Great Ancestor, but the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone is useful.

Moreover, even if he broke through to the Heavenly Ancestor realm, it did not mean that all the immeasurable divine powers in the Heavenly Ancestor's body were integrated into the whole body.

Many Heavenly Ancestors have broken through to the Heavenly Ancestor realm with a technique of immeasurable supernatural powers, and this immeasurable supernatural technique has been integrated into the whole body, and other immeasurable supernatural techniques have not been integrated into the whole body.

Although it was less difficult for the Heavenly Ancestor to integrate the Infinite Divine Power Technique into his whole body, it was still very difficult.

At this time, they were no longer able to use the resource of Aotaki liquid, so they either relied on their own slow penance or relied on other treasures.

At present, only the True Dragon Blood Marrow Stone has an effect, and the True Dragon Blood Marrow Liquid can be extracted from it, and taking it can slowly integrate the power of the Immeasurable Divine Power Technique into the whole body.

And as long as there are enough True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stones, it can 100% allow a Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor to break through to the Heavenly Ancestor, and it can also make the Heavenly Ancestor's strength continue to increase.

However, the number of True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stones is too small and too rare, and it is only found in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm.

If it weren't for the treasure illustrated book given to him by the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, he wouldn't have known about the existence of this treasure at all.

The number of True Dragon Blood Stones is extremely rare, but the number of True Dragon Blood Stones is slightly larger, and the True Dragon Blood Stones will become True Dragon Blood Stones after endless and long years of gestation, but that time is unimaginably long.

But as long as the blood of the true dragon is watered, the time can be sped up.

After all, the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone was originally the True Dragon Blood that was accidentally scattered in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm, and it often evolved over a long period of time before the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone was formed.

So, in essence, the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone is an advanced treasure of the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone.

"Can my ability to fuse all things with the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone into the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If he could, then he could hopefully obtain a large amount of True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stones.

Of course, the premise is that he obtains some True Dragon Blood Golden Stones first.

"Do you have a lot of True Dragon Blood Stones?" Ye Tian asked.

"There are quite a few, all of them were found in the True Dragon Realm Ruins!" "Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor said, "Moreover, there are a lot of True Dragon Blood Golden Stones where that True Dragon is located!"

Ye Tian hesitated for a moment and said, "Assign me some True Dragon Blood Golden Stones, and I will agree to cooperate." "
